overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring the dystopian Night City. The video transitions between third-person walking through neon-lit urban environments and brief driving sequences, capturing the game's signature cyberpunk aesthetic with towering buildings, holographic billboards, and wet reflective streets at dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial parking lot with wet pavement and graffiti walls

events.description: character leans into black sports car window to interact with occupant
character walks away from vehicle toward another individual standing in the lot

agents.ego_description: character leans into car window, then walks away across wet pavement toward a second character

notable_agents.action: second character standing with arms crossed, engaging in conversation with ego

entered.detail: sleek black vehicle with chrome accents, driver's side window open
tall gray concrete wall with metal scaffolding and industrial pipes
diagonal yellow painted lines marking parking spaces on wet asphalt
large blue and red advertisement visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: In an industrial parking lot at dusk, a character interacts with someone in a black sports car before walking away across the wet pavement. The area features concrete walls with graffiti, yellow parking markings, and distant billboards visible between industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with commercial billboards

events.description: perspective switches from third-person walking to first-person vehicle driving
vehicle turns right at intersection, passing other cars and billboards

agents.ego_description: driving a vehicle through city streets, navigating turns and passing other traffic

entered.detail: hood of the vehicle visible from driver's perspective, reflecting street lights
red illuminated street sign reading 'Senate Ave' mounted on building
multiple large holographic advertisements on building facades including political ads

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to a vehicle driving through city streets at dusk, passing palm trees and large digital billboards. The car navigates a turn at an intersection marked by a 'Senate Ave' sign, with other vehicles visible on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered alley with construction barriers and industrial overhead structures

events.description: transition from driving to walking, entering narrow alleyway with graffiti walls
passing orange and white construction barriers and concrete dividers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow urban alley with graffiti-covered walls, heading toward a commercial district

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red mohawk and tank top walking past camera in opposite direction

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art including a large skull
orange and white striped construction barriers blocking off areas
metal scaffolding and industrial pipes overhead with steam vents
glowing neon signs visible at the end of the alley indicating commercial area ahead

segments.scene_description: The character, now in a blue hoodie, walks through a narrow alleyway lined with graffiti-covered concrete walls and construction barriers. Industrial scaffolding looms overhead as the character approaches a distant glow of neon signs, passing other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial street with massive digital billboards and overhead pedestrian bridges

events.description: exiting narrow alley into covered commercial area with dense holographic advertisements
approaching busy intersection with visible traffic and crosswalk ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered urban corridor lined with massive digital billboards and neon signs, surrounded by other pedestrians heading in the same direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants and backpack walking ahead toward the intersection

entered.detail: metal walkway bridge connecting buildings overhead with people visible on it
massive blue and red illuminated billboard for Cirrus Cola dominating the right side
cluster of bright holographic ads including '2nd Amendment' and political messages
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley into a covered commercial street beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge. Massive digital billboards including a prominent Cirrus Cola advertisement illuminate the area with neon light. The character walks with a moderate crowd toward a busy intersection, passing palm trees and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with heavy traffic and towering neon buildings

events.description: crossing the street at crosswalk with other pedestrians while vehicles wait
turning right at the intersection and continuing along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing a busy intersection alongside other pedestrians, then continuing along the sidewalk as various vehicles pass by on the street

notable_agents.action: white and red van driving past on the street, followed by other cars

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt
red illuminated street sign reading 'Senate Ave' mounted on corner building
elevated highway structure with multiple levels and support columns
tall skyscrapers covered in bright neon signs and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a busy intersection at a crosswalk, surrounded by other pedestrians and dense traffic including a white van. After crossing, the character turns right along a sidewalk lined with towering buildings covered in bright neon signage. The Senate Ave sign marks the corner as the character continues through the vibrant downtown area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a gritty industrial lot through the bustling city streets and into a claustrophobic urban alleyway. It begins with a character interacting with a black sports car on wet pavement surrounded by graffiti-covered concrete and distant billboards. As the perspective shifts, the camera glides into a vehicle navigating a turn at the Senate Ave intersection, passing palm trees and towering digital displays under a dusk sky. The scene then transitions to a first-person walk through a narrow alley, where industrial scaffolding and construction barriers frame the path. Finally, the camera moves past oncoming pedestrians toward the distant, vibrant glow of neon signs reflecting off the concrete walls.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered commercial corridor into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a bustling downtown intersection. It begins as the character emerges from a narrow alley into a covered street, passing beneath a pedestrian bridge illuminated by massive digital billboards and a prominent Cirrus Cola advertisement. As the character moves through a moderate crowd past palm trees and holographic displays, the scene opens up into a busy crosswalk filled with pedestrians and dense traffic. The camera then follows the character across the street and around a corner marked by a Senate Ave sign, shifting the perspective toward a sidewalk lined with towering buildings. Finally, the view expands to capture the vibrant scale of the city as the character continues deeper into the glowing urban landscape.
